name: Chocolate Covered Cherry Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, whisk together flour, cocoa powder, salt, baking powder, and baking soda.
3. In another bowl, beat butter and sugar until creamy. Add egg and vanilla, mixing well.
4. Gradually stir the dry ingredients into the wet mixture until combined.
5. Remove about 1/4 of the batter and set aside to make frosting (see separate instructions).
6. Roll the remaining dough into small balls and place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
7. Gently press Maraschino cherries onto the flat side of each cookie ball.
8. Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until golden brown.
9. Remove from oven and let cool on wire rack.
10. Spread frosting over cooled cookies.
Frosting Instructions:
1. Beat butter until creamy.
2. Gradually add powdered sugar, mixing well after each addition.
3. Stir in vanilla. Adjust sweetness to taste if needed.
